stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
What does the symbol indicate on a significant weather chart?

options.a: The centre of a high pressure area at 400 hPa.
options.b: The upper limit of significant weather at FL 400.
options.c: The lower limit of the tropopause.
options.d: The centre of a tropopause “high”, where the tropopause is at FL 400.
